args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cache_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --cache-root "$cache_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness >/dev/null
cache_file=$(find "$cache_dir" -name artifact.json | head -n 1)
namespace_dir=$(dirname "$(dirname "$cache_file")")
stale_dir="$namespace_dir/stale-prefill-sibling"
unrelated_dir="$namespace_dir/unrelated-sibling"
python3 - "$cache_file" "$stale_dir" "$unrelated_dir" <<'PY'
import json, pathlib, sys
cache_file = pathlib.Path(sys.argv[1])
stale_dir = pathlib.Path(sys.argv[2])
unrelated_dir = pathlib.Path(sys.argv[3])
doc = json.loads(cache_file.read_text())
stale = dict(doc)
stale["storage_key"] = "stale-prefill-sibling"
stale["manifest_identity"] = "stale-prefill-sibling"
stale_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(stale_dir / "artifact.json").write_text(json.dumps(stale))
unrelated = dict(doc)
unrelated["storage_key"] = "unrelated-sibling"
unrelated["manifest_identity"] = "unrelated-sibling"
unrelated["invalidation_domain"] = "other_domain"
unrelated_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(unrelated_dir / "artifact.json").write_text(json.dumps(unrelated))
corrupted = dict(doc)
corrupted["manifest_identity"] = "corrupted-primary"
cache_file.write_text(json.dumps(corrupted))
PY
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --cache-root "$cache_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness >/dev/null
[ ! -d "$stale_dir" ]
[ -d "$unrelated_dir" ]
printf 'cache-invalidated\n'
